message:
feat(fnp-python): port expm1/log1p to native with integer promotion fallback

Introduces native_unary_promoting helper that extends native_unary_elementwise
by also falling back to NumPy for integer dtypes (which need float promotion).
expm1 and log1p now use native Rust paths for float inputs while preserving
NumPy semantics for integers and complex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
